---
name: Engineering Ticket
about: Create an engineering ticket following the repository ticket standard
title: 'task: [TSK-XXX] [Title]'
labels: 'task'
assignees: ''
---

# Ticket ID: [TSK-XXX]
## Title: [Descriptive Title]

**Priority:** [Low / Medium / High / Critical]  
**Sprint:** [Sprint Number]  
**Story:** [As a... I want to... So that...]  

### Business Context
[Explanation of why this ticket is needed from a business, user, or product standpoint.]

### Current Behaviour
[What the code does currently, or description of the current lack of implementation.]

### Expected Behaviour
[Detailed narrative of what the code must do once the ticket is complete.]

### Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2

### Technical Notes
[Specific architectural constraints, packages to target, dependencies to include, or performance expectations.]

### Hints
[Helpful directions to speed up implementation, e.g. "Check the standard mapping in GlobalExceptionHandler.java for ideas."]

### Related Files
- [Link to File 1](file:///...)
- [Link to File 2](file:///...)

**Estimated Difficulty:** [Easy / Medium / Hard]  
**Learning Objective:** [What key concepts or techniques the developer will practice by completing this ticket.]
